Senior Client Partner  ·  2025
About Me

Strategy rooted in culture,
not just data.

I'm Ankit Kumar Swashi — a Senior Client Partner at DViO Digital with 3.5+ years of experience in brand marketing, managing multiple brands, digital campaigns, product launches, and cross-platform brand strategies.

My work spans music marketing, healthcare communication, aviation logistics, fintech, and lifestyle storytelling — across clients like Universal Music India, SmartKargo, Artis, ABMH, DotPe Capitals, and Flipkart. I believe the best campaigns don't just reach audiences — they earn a place in conversations.

From launching Bhojpuri folk music on Instagram to crafting monsoon-insight-driven healthcare narratives, I bring a cultural lens to every brief I touch.

VYRL Bhojpuri × Coke Studio Bharat
Kauchari Gali
A collaborative music video reclaiming the folk soul of Bihar & UP
Drove a cultural reset for Bhojpuri music — breaking the stereotype of vulgarity by positioning folk artistry at the forefront. Partnered VYRL Bhojpuri with Coke Studio Bharat and activated Instagram as the primary discovery platform, leveraging influencer storytelling to reach audiences who had never engaged with Bhojpuri content before.

Healthcare · Brand Communication · 360° Campaign
Aditya Birla Memorial Hospital
"More Than Rain"
Monsoon 2024
The Brief
A comprehensive 360° marketing approach — activating hospital branding, outdoor advertising, social media management, and paid ad campaigns.
The campaign drew on the insight that monsoon season brings more than just rain — it also unveils hidden health risks. Using the metaphor "water runs deep," the narrative highlighted how unseen threats surface unexpectedly, positioning ABMH as a trusted health partner focused on preventive healthcare and community well-being.
Campaign Pillars
Outdoor (OOH)
Billboards & hoardings across Pune with monsoon insight-led messaging
Social Media
Character-led storytelling with Pinto & Lapetya as campaign mascots
Brand Awareness
New leads, improved footfall & increased brand recall across Pune
Paid Ads
Targeted digital campaigns driving appointment bookings & awareness
Campaign Creatives
Monsoon Feels
Monsoon Thrill
Meet Pinto
Meet Lapetya
360°
Campaign Approach
OOH + Social
+ Paid Ads
Monsoon

Pune
Market Activation
Consumer Electronics · Social Media Campaign
Artis
Valentine's Day Campaign
Valentine's 2024
The Campaign
"Why should couples have all the fun?" — A Valentine's campaign built for singles.
Artis is an electronics brand specialising in speakers, power solutions, and audio accessories. For Valentine's Day, instead of targeting couples, we flipped the script — engaging the singles audience with a fun contest. Contestants were asked to rewrite love song lyrics, dedicate the song to themselves, and post in the comments while following @artis.in to qualify.
"Mai toh itta single hu, itta single hu ki..." — A relatable hook that drove massive comment engagement and shares.
Campaign Results
385K+
Total Views
86K+
Engagement
Numbers extracted from Meta Dashboard
Singles-First Strategy
Flipped Valentine's Day messaging to capture an underserved but highly engaged audience segment
UGC Contest Mechanic
Comment-to-win format drove organic reach, follower growth, and brand recall

Healthtech · AI-Generated Digital Ad
Orange Health Labs
Dengue Test at Home — 30s AI Ad
▶ Watch Ad
The Campaign
A 30-second AI-generated digital advertisement to boost dengue test bookings during peak season.
We developed an AI-generated video ad for Orange Health Labs centred on speed, accuracy, and convenience — the three pillars of their home diagnostics service. The narrative was crafted to be engaging and emotionally relatable, positioning Orange Health Labs as a trusted, technology-supported diagnostic partner during high dengue season.
Key Message
"Dengue Test At Home — Sample Collection in 60 Minutes"
What We Built
◎
AI-Generated Video Ad
30-second digital ad produced end-to-end using AI — visuals, narrative, and pacing
◈
Seasonal Relevance
Timed for high dengue season to maximise booking intent and urgency
◉
Technology Positioning
Reinforced OHL's brand as a fast, accurate, and tech-forward diagnostic partner
▶  Watch the Ad

Aviation Logistics · B2B Content & Brand Strategy
SmartKargo
A digital cargo platform helping airlines move from legacy systems to real-time, e-commerce-ready logistics. I actively handle three brands across the SmartKargo ecosystem — building content, brand narratives, and go-to-market collateral that position air cargo as a modern, revenue-driving asset.
3 Brands
One-Pagers & Documents
SmartKargo
Revenue Playbook · E-book
A long-form B2B e-book — "From Legacy Systems to Digital Dominance" — making the revenue case for digital cargo transformation across 5 chapters.
View One-Pager PDF
Deliver Direct
One-Pager · Brand Narrative
"Your Shipping Network is Part of Your Brand Now" — a sharp one-pager powered by Delta Cargo's air network, framing delivery as a brand experience for e-commerce retailers.
View One-Pager PDF
deliver-e
One-Pager · Infographic
"Your Parcel Isn't Late… It Just Hasn't Left Yet" — an insight-led infographic exposing where cross-border delays really happen, and how deliver-e removes the waiting.

Conglomerate · Employer Branding & Social Media
Aditya Birla Group
Led employer branding and corporate social media for one of India's largest conglomerates — building campaigns around inclusion, opportunity, and culture under hashtags like #AbilityMeetsOpportunity and #NotwithstandingDistances. The work humanised the brand and drew a younger demographic into the ABG story.
Employer Brand

Streetwear · Fashion & Lifestyle · Homegrown Pune
UnderRated Club
"Hype is overrated. Stay underrated."
Just like the name, UnderRated stands for the ones often unseen, unrecognised, and underrated. Born in Pune, it's a homegrown streetwear brand where fashion isn't just about clothes — it's about how they make you feel, how they make you seen. I led social-first content and brand storytelling, building a visual language as bold and unapologetic as the brand itself.
Pune, IN

E-commerce · Year-in-Review Film
Flipkart
A Year of Milestones
▶ Watch Film
The Project
A year-in-review film celebrating Flipkart's biggest achievements across the year.
We crafted a recap film that brought together a year of momentum for Flipkart — spotlighting CSR initiatives, new product and category launches, marquee campaigns, and supply chain milestones. The narrative wove individual wins into one cohesive story of growth, purpose, and national reach.
What We Highlighted
◎
CSR Initiatives
Community and social impact programs run through the year
◈
New Launches
Product, category, and feature launches across the platform
◉
Campaigns & Supply Chain
Marquee campaigns and a deepened supply chain footprint across UP, Bihar, Haryana, Tripura & more

Experience

The journey
so far.

Aug 2024 – Present
Senior Client Partner
DViO Digital
Managing retainer and project-based clients across India and global markets — including Universal Music India, SmartKargo, Artis, DotPe Capitals, Aditya Birla Memorial Hospital, and Flipkart. Handling a ₹15L+ monthly revenue portfolio with ₹8L+ ad budgets across healthcare, automobile, and education sectors. Led social media strategy, content planning, brand communication, and end-to-end website design across SmartKargo, Deliver Direct, deliver-e, Artis, and Alliance University.
Jan 2024 – Jul 2024
Social Media Executive
Kings Group
Managed brand presence and digital engagement across F&B, Fashion, and Hospitality — for Villas by Noor, Circle of Crust, Fuji Cream, Tian, J Clean, and UnderRated Club. Built content calendars, crafted on-brand copy, and optimised content through analytics to drive reach and engagement.
Mar 2022 – Dec 2023
Social Media Executive
Cobuzz, Innoserv Group
Handled social media management across multiple industries for brands like Dream11, Bajaj Finserv, Khatabook, Colgate, Aditya Birla Group, Viu, Medline, and CarDekho. Focused on employer branding, content planning, calendar management, and performance analysis to ensure consistent brand communication.
Process
How I work.
Every campaign starts with a question: what does this audience actually care about right now?
◎
Cultural Insight
Every campaign begins with understanding the cultural moment — what people are feeling, sharing, and reaching for.
◈
Communication Strategy
Translating brand objectives into architecture that spans channels, formats, and segments with clarity.
◉
Audience Behaviour
Reading how audiences consume content and how to place a brand in the path of genuine attention.
◇
Campaign Storytelling
Crafting narratives that live beyond the campaign window — stories that create recall and lasting equity.
